positive_contracts_covered: actual PCM WAV decode for 8, 16, 24, and 32 bit sample widths
computed duration, peak, RMS, silence, clipping, frame, channel, and sample-rate metrics
internally recomputed transcript word error rate
voice profile, character, contract, line, audio, proof, and model-hash bindings
ASR segment timing evaluated before final timing-gate status
strict speaker identity, emotion, intensity, playback, and runtime proof contracts
canonical-root containment and transactional output publication
fixed canonical production-proof authority registry and exact proof-bundle allowlist contract
request and evidence Draft 2020-12 schema validation
negative_contracts_covered: synthetic packet cannot pass runtime, authority, or overall gates
locally authored non-synthetic packet cannot pass the empty authority registry
ASR-only timing drift, duration drift, transcript mismatch, speaker mismatch, and emotion mismatch
missing playback proof, malformed WAV, tampered artifact hash, malformed model hash, and non-finite values
unknown request or proof keys and invalid ratio ranges
root escape, caller root override, output collision, and invalid exact line sets
duplicate audio reuse and duplicate speaker or emotion line results
unapproved proof bundle and proof-bundle-to-proof hash mismatch
invalid input preserves an existing output file
